# schemas/generated

**DO NOT EDIT files in this directory.**

All files here are auto-generated by `npm run generate:crud` and will be
overwritten on every run.

To customise a schema, edit the **sidecar file** one level up:

```
schemas/<table>.schema.js   ← yours to edit (re-exports generated, add overrides here)
```

To change what is generated, edit the generator template:
```
scripts/generate-crud.ts
```
